1: // Description: Access Control registers
2: //
3: 
4: 
5: 
6: module reglk_wrapper #(
7:     parameter int unsigned AXI_ADDR_WIDTH = 64,
8:     parameter int unsigned AXI_DATA_WIDTH = 64,
9:     parameter int unsigned AXI_ID_WIDTH   = 10,
10:     parameter NB_SLAVE = 1,
11:     parameter NB_PERIPHERALS = 14
12: )(
13:            clk_i,
14:            rst_ni,
15:            jtag_unlock,
16:            reglk_ctrl_i,
17:            acct_ctrl_i,
18:            reglk_ctrl_o,
19:            axi_req_i, 
20:            axi_resp_o,
21:            rst_9
22:        );
23: 
24: 
25:     input  logic                   clk_i;
26:     input  logic                   rst_ni;
27:     input  logic                   jtag_unlock;
28:     input logic [7 :0]             reglk_ctrl_i; // register lock values
29:     input logic                    acct_ctrl_i;
30:     input  ariane_axi::req_t       axi_req_i;
31:     output ariane_axi::resp_t      axi_resp_o;
32:     output logic [8*NB_PERIPHERALS-1 :0]   reglk_ctrl_o; // register lock values
33:     input logic rst_9;
34: 
35: 
36: // internal signals
37: 
38: logic [15:0] reglk_ctrl ;  
39: reg [5:0][31:0] reglk_mem ;   // this size is sufficient for 24 slaves where each slave gets 8 bits
40: 
41: // signals from AXI 4 Lite
42: logic [AXI_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] address;
43: logic                      en, en_acct;
44: logic                      we;
45: logic [63:0] wdata;
46: logic [63:0] rdata;
47: 
48: assign reglk_ctrl_o = {reglk_mem[5], reglk_mem[4], reglk_mem[3], reglk_mem[2], reglk_mem[1], reglk_mem[0]}; 
49: 
50: assign reglk_ctrl = reglk_ctrl_i;
51: 
52: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
53:     // -----------------------------
54:     // AXI Interface Logic
55:     // -----------------------------
56:     axi_lite_interface #(
57:         .AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ( AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ),
58:         .AXI_DATA_WIDTH ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH ),
59:         .AXI_ID_WIDTH   ( AXI_ID_WIDTH    )
60:     ) axi_lite_interface_i (
61:         .clk_i      ( clk_i      ),
62:         .rst_ni     ( rst_ni     ),
63:         .axi_req_i  ( axi_req_i  ),
64:         .axi_resp_o ( axi_resp_o ),
65:         .address_o  ( address    ),
66:         .en_o       ( en_acct    ),
67:         .we_o       ( we         ),
68:         .data_i     ( rdata      ),
69:         .data_o     ( wdata      )
70:     );
71: 
72:     assign en = en_acct && acct_ctrl_i; 
73: 
74: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
75: // Implement APB I/O map to PKT interface
76: // Write side
77: integer j;
78: always @(posedge clk_i)
79:     begin
80:         if(~(rst_ni && ~jtag_unlock && ~rst_9))
81:             begin
82:               for (j=0; j < 6; j=j+1) begin
83:                 reglk_mem[j] <= 'h0;
84:               end
85:             end
86:         else if(en && we)
87:             case(address[7:3])
88:                 0:
89:                     reglk_mem[0]  <= reglk_ctrl[3] ? reglk_mem[0] : wdata;
90:                 1:
91:                     reglk_mem[1]  <= reglk_ctrl[1] ? reglk_mem[1] : wdata; 
92:                 2:
93:                     reglk_mem[2]  <= reglk_ctrl[1] ? reglk_mem[3] : wdata;
94:                 3:
95:                     reglk_mem[3]  <= reglk_ctrl[1] ? reglk_mem[3] : wdata;
96:                 4:
97:                     reglk_mem[4]  <= reglk_ctrl[1] ? reglk_mem[4] : wdata;
98:                 5:
99:                     reglk_mem[5]  <= reglk_ctrl[1] ? reglk_mem[5] : wdata;
100:                 default:
101:                     ;
102:             endcase
103:     end // always @ (posedge wb_clk_i)
104: 
105: //// Read side
106: always @(*)
107:     begin
108:       rdata = 64'b0; 
109:       if (en) begin
110:         case(address[7:3])
111:             0:
112:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[0]; 
113:             1:          
114:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl[0] ? 'b0 : reglk_mem[1];
115:             2:          
116:
[TRUNCATED]

160: // Implement MD5 I/O memory map interface
161: // Read side
162: //always @(~write)
163: always @(*)
164:     begin
165:       rdata = 64'b0; 
166:       if (en) begin
167:         rdata = key0[address[8:3]]; 
168:         case(address[8:3])
169:             0:
170:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[0] ? 'b0 : {31'b0, start};
171:             1:
172:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[2] ? 'b0 : p_c[3];
173:             2:
174:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[2] ? 'b0 : p_c[2];
175:             3:
176:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[2] ? 'b0 : p_c[1];
177:             4:
178:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[2] ? 'b0 : p_c[0];
179:             11:
180:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[6] ? 'b0 : {31'b0, ct_valid};
181:             12:
182:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[4] ? 'b0 : ct[31:0];
183:             13:                                                 
184:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[4] ? 'b0 : ct[63:32];
185:             14:                                                 
186:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[4] ? 'b0 : ct[95:64];
187:             15:                                                 
188:                 rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[4] ? 'b0 : ct[127:96];
189:             default:
190:                 if (ct_valid)
191:                     rdata = 32'b0;
192:         endcase
193:       end // if
194:     end // always @ (*)
195: 
196: 
197: // select the proper key
198: 
199: assign key_big = key_sel[1] ? key_big2 : ( key_sel[0] ? key_big1 : key_big0 );  
200: 
201: 
202: aes_192_sed aes(
203:             .clk(clk_i),
204:             .state(state_big),
205:             .p_c_text(p_c_big),
206:             .key(key_big),
207:             .start(start),
208:             .out(ct),
209:             .out_valid(ct_valid)
210:         );
211: 
212: endmodule

185: 
186: 
187: // select the proper key
188: 
189: assign cii_K = key_sel[1] ? cii_K2 : ( key_sel[0] ? cii_K1 : cii_K0 );
190: 
191: aes2_interface aes2_interface(
192:     .clk(clk_i),
193:     .iv(state_big),
194:     .rst(rst_ni && ~rst_11),
195:     .start(start),
196:     .cii_K(cii_K),
197:     .input_pc(dii_data),
198:     
199:     .Out_data_final(ct),
200:     .ct_valid_out(ct_valid)
201:     );
202: 
203: endmodule

1: // Description: Access Control registers
2: //
3: 
4: 
5: module acct_wrapper #(
6:     parameter int unsigned AXI_ADDR_WIDTH = 64,
7:     parameter int unsigned AXI_DATA_WIDTH = 64,
8:     parameter int unsigned AXI_ID_WIDTH   = 10,
9:     parameter NB_SLAVE = 1,
10:     parameter NB_PERIPHERALS = 9
11: )(
12:            clk_i,
13:            rst_ni,
14:            reglk_ctrl_i,
15:            acct_ctrl_i,
16:            acc_ctrl_o,
17:            we_flag,
18:            axi_req_i, 
19:            axi_resp_o,
20:            rst_6
21:        );
22: 
23: 
24:     input  logic                   clk_i;
25:     input  logic                   rst_ni;
26:     input logic [7 :0]             reglk_ctrl_i; // register lock valuesA
27:     input logic                    acct_ctrl_i;
28:     input  ariane_axi::req_t       axi_req_i;
29:     output ariane_axi::resp_t      axi_resp_o;
30:     output logic [4*NB_PERIPHERALS-1 :0]   acc_ctrl_o; // Access control values
31:     input logic  we_flag;
32: 
33:     localparam AcCt_MEM_SIZE = NB_SLAVE*3 ;  // 32*3 bytes of access control for each slave interface
34: 
35:     input rst_6;
36: 
37: // internal signals
38: 
39: reg [AcCt_MEM_SIZE-1:0][31:0] acct_mem ; 
40: logic [15:0] reglk_ctrl ;  
41: 
42: // signals from AXI 4 Lite
43: logic [AXI_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] address;
44: logic                      en, en_acct;
45: logic                      we;
46: logic [63:0] wdata;
47: logic [63:0] rdata;
48: 
49: assign acc_ctrl_o = {acct_mem[3*0+2], acct_mem[3*0+1], acct_mem[3*0+0]|{8{we_flag}}}; 
50: 
51: assign reglk_ctrl = reglk_ctrl_i;
52: 
53: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
54:     // -----------------------------
55:     // AXI Interface Logic
56:     // -----------------------------
57:     axi_lite_interface #(
58:         .AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ( AXI_ADDR_WIDTH ),
59:         .AXI_DATA_WIDTH ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH ),
60:         .AXI_ID_WIDTH   ( AXI_ID_WIDTH    )
61:     ) axi_lite_interface_i (
62:         .clk_i      ( clk_i      ),
63:         .rst_ni     ( rst_ni     ),
64:         .axi_req_i  ( axi_req_i  ),
65:         .axi_resp_o ( axi_resp_o ),
66:         .address_o  ( address    ),
67:         .en_o       ( en_acct    ),
68:         .we_o       ( we         ),
69:         .data_i     ( rdata      ),
70:         .data_o     ( wdata      )
71:     );
72: 
73:     assign en = en_acct && acct_ctrl_i; 
74: 
75: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
76: // Implement APB I/O map to PKT interface
77: // Write side
78: integer j;
79: always @(posedge clk_i)
80:     begin
81:         if(~(rst_ni && ~rst_6))
82:             begin
83:               for (j=0; j < AcCt_MEM_SIZE; j=j+1) begin
84:                 acct_mem[j] <= 32'hffffffff; 
85:               end
86:             end
87:         else if(en && we)
88:             case(address[10:3])
89:                 0:
90:                     acct_mem[00]  <= reglk_ctrl[5] ? acct_mem[00] : wdata;
91:                 1:                                             
92:                     acct_mem[01]  <= reglk_ctrl[5] ? acct_mem[01] : wdata; 
93:                 2:                                             
94:                     acct_mem[02]  <= reglk_ctrl[5] ? acct_mem[02] : wdata;
95:                 3:                                              
96:                     acct_mem[03]  <= reglk_ctrl[13] ? acct_mem[03] : wdata;
97:                 4:                                               
98:                     acct_mem[04]  <= reglk_ctrl[13] ? acct_mem[04] : wdata;
99:                 5:                                               
100:                     acct_mem[05]  <= reglk_ctrl[13] ? acct_mem[05] : wdata;
101:                 6:                                              
102:                     acct_mem[06]  <= reglk_ctrl[1] ? acct_mem[06] : wdata;
103:                 7:                                              
104:                     acct_mem
[TRUNCATED]

{"tool": "read_file", "status": "ok", "content": "200:     output [NumHarts-1:0][1:0]          irq_o         // level sensitive IR lines, mip & sip (async)
201: );
202: 
203:   localparam int unsigned AxiIdWidth    =  1;
204:   localparam int unsigned AxiAddrWidth  = 64;
205:   localparam int unsigned AxiDataWidth  = 64;
206:   localparam int unsigned AxiUserWidth  =  1;
207: 
208: 
209: 
210:   parameter  FUSE_MEM_SIZE = 150; // change this size when ever no of entries in FUSE mem is changed
211:   parameter NB_SLAVE = 1;
212:   parameter NB_PERIPHERALS = 14;
213: 
214:   logic [8*NB_PERIPHERALS-1:0] reglk_ctrl; 
215:   logic [4*NB_PERIPHERALS-1 :0]   acc_ctrl; // Access control values
216:   logic [3:0][NB_PERIPHERALS-1:0] acc_ctrl_c; 
217: 
218:    genvar i, j;
219:    generate
220:        for (i=0; i < 4; i++) begin
221:         for (j=0; j < NB_PERIPHERALS; j++) begin
222:            assign acc_ctrl_c[i][j] = acc_ctrl[j*4+i] | (j==5 && acc_ctrl[4*4+i]);
223:         end
224:        end 
225:    endgenerate 
226: 
227: 
228:

254:   assign dmi_req.op = dm::dtm_op_t'(debug_req_bits_op);

256:   SimDTM i_SimDTM (

265:     .debug_resp_ready     ( debug_resp_ready     ),

267:     .debug_resp_bits_data ( debug_resp.data      ),
268:     .exit                 ( sim_exit             )
269:   );
270: 
271: `else // RISCV_FESVR_SIM
272: 
273:   logic        tck, tms, trst_n, tdi, tdo, tdo_oe;
274: 
275:   dmi_jtag i_dmi_jtag (
276:     .clk_i                                ,
277:     .rst_ni                               ,
278:     .testmode_i                           ,
279:     .we_flag          ( we_flag_4        ),
280:     .jtag_hash_i      ( jtag_hash        ),
281:     .okey_hash_i      ( okey_hash        ),
282:     .ikey_hash_i      ( ikey_hash        ),
283:     .jtag_unlock_o    ( jtag_unlock      ),
284:     .dmi_req_o        ( debug_req        ),
285:     .dmi_req_valid_o  ( debug_req_valid  ),
286:     .dmi_req_ready_i  ( debug_req_ready  ),
287:     .dmi_resp_i       ( debug_resp       ),
288:     .dmi_resp_ready_o ( debug_resp_ready ),
289:     .dmi_resp_valid_i ( debug_resp_valid ),
290:     .dmi_rst_no       (                  ), // not connected
291:     .tck_i            ( tck              ),
292:     .tms_i            ( tms              ),
293:     .trst_ni          ( trst_n           ),
294:     .td_i             ( tdi              ),
295:     .td_o             ( tdo              ),
296:     .tdo_oe_o         ( tdo_oe           )
297:   );
298: 
299: `ifdef RISCV_JTAG_SIM
300:

302:     $display("[INFO] instantiating JTAG DTM in simul

{"tool": "read_file", "status": "ok", "content": "1580:     .w_reqbuf_size          (                               ),
1581:     .r_reqbuf_size          (                               )
1582:   );

1584:   // tie off signals not used by AXI-lite

1587:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.size   = 3'b11;// 8byte
1588:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.burst  = '0;
1589:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.lock   = '0;
1590:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.cache  = '0;
1591:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.prot   = '0;
1592:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.qos    = '0;
1593:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.region = '0;
1594:   assign hmac_axi_req.aw.atop   = '0;
1595:   assign hmac_axi_req.w.last    = 1'b1;
1596:   assign hmac_axi_req.ar.id     = '0;
1597:   assign hmac_axi_req.ar.len    = '0;
1598:   assign hmac_axi_req.ar.size   = 3'b11;// 8byte

1600:   assign hmac_axi_req.ar.lock   = '0;

piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/openpiton/riscv_peripherals.sv:344: logic                dm_master_req;
piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/openpiton/riscv_peripherals.sv:345: logic [64-1:0]       dm_master_add;

piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/openpiton/riscv_peripherals.sv:373: .master_req_o         ( dm_master_req        ),
piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/openpiton/riscv_peripherals.sv:374: .master_add_o         ( dm_master_add        ),
piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/openpiton/riscv_peripherals.sv:375: .master_we_o          ( dm_master_we         ),
piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/openpiton/riscv_peripherals.sv:376: .master_wdata_o       ( dm_master_wdata      ),

  "module2_permission_inspection": [
    {
      "obligation_id": "M2_PERM_RISCV_PERIPH_DEBUG_JTAG_AUTH",
      "status": "candidate_violation",
      "subject": "external JTAG/debug interface and debug NOC port",
      "operation": "read/write DMI, trigger hart debug control, access debug module slave",
      "object": "dm_top hart debug controls: debug_req_o, ndmreset_o, dmactive_o; debug-module slave registers",
      "expected_guard": "debug authorization or jtag_unlock/authentication plus lifecycle/test-mode mediation before DMI requests can control harts or access debug-module registers",
      "observed_behavior": "dmi_jtag receives hash inputs and emits jtag_unlock, but debug_req/debug_resp are wired directly between dmi_jtag and dm_top. dm_top outputs debug_req_o, ndmreset_o, and dmactive_o. The top-level wiring does not gate dmi_req_valid_o or dm_top DMI inputs with jtag_unlock, testmode_i, or an explicit authorization signal. A separate debug NOC AXI-lite bridge also connects directly to dm_master/axi2mem path into dm_top slave interface. dm_master system-bus outputs are tied off, so memory master access appears disabled in this file.",
      "path": "JTAG pins -> dmi_jtag -> debug_req/debug_resp -> dm_top -> debug_req_o/ndmreset_o/dmactive_o; debug NOC -> noc_axilite_bridge -> dm_master AXI -> axi2mem -> dm_slave_* -> dm_top",
      "state_condition": "testmode_i is passed into dmi_jtag and dm_top; jtag_unlock is generated but not used to gate debug_req_valid/debug_req; dmactive_o/ndmreset_o/debug_req_o are direct dm_top outputs; dm_master_gnt/r_valid/rdata are tied to zero.",
      "impact": "An unauthenticated or insufficiently mediated JTAG/debug path could halt or reset harts and access debug-module control state. Although debug-module system-bus master memory access is tied off here, hart-control debug access remains security-sensitive.",
      "rtl_evidence": [
        "riscv_peripherals.sv:275-289 dmi_jtag connects .jtag_unlock_o(jtag_unlock), .dmi_req_o(debug_req), .dmi_req_valid_o(debug_req_valid), .dmi_resp_i(debug_resp) without visible jtag_unlock gate.",
        "riscv_peripherals.sv:353-388 dm_top receives .dmi_req_valid_i(debug_req_valid), .dmi_req_i(debug_req) and drives .ndmreset_o, .dmactive_o, .debug_req_o.",
        "riscv_peripherals.sv:397-412 axi2mem converts dm_master AXI to dm_slave_* for dm_top.",
        "riscv_peripherals.sv:414-453 debug NOC bridge drives dm_master AXI.",
